summary: Complete testing of SDM Notification System and Float Alerts. Backend: 100% (20/20 tests passed). Frontend: All UI components working correctly - Notifications tab with create/list/delete functionality, Alerts tab with webhook/email configuration and alert history.

issues: Minor React hydration warning about <span> in <tbody> - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: POST /api/sdm/admin/notifications - Create notification to 'all' recipients
POST /api/sdm/admin/notifications - Create notification to 'clients' only
POST /api/sdm/admin/notifications - Create notification to 'merchants' only
POST /api/sdm/admin/notifications - Create 'info' type notification with 'low' priority
GET /api/sdm/admin/notifications - List all notifications
GET /api/sdm/admin/notifications?notification_type=promo - Filter by type
DELETE /api/sdm/admin/notifications/{id} - Delete notification
DELETE /api/sdm/admin/notifications/{id} - Returns 404 for non-existent
GET /api/sdm/admin/float-alerts - Get alert history
GET /api/sdm/admin/float-alerts?acknowledged=false - Filter unacknowledged
POST /api/sdm/admin/float-alerts/test - Test alert (returns 400 if no config, 200 if configured)
Configure webhook URL via PUT /api/sdm/admin/config and test alert
POST /api/sdm/admin/float-alerts/{id}/acknowledge - Acknowledge alert
GET /api/sdm/user/notifications - Get user's notifications with read status
GET /api/sdm/user/notifications?unread_only=true - Filter unread notifications
GET /api/sdm/user/notifications/unread-count - Get unread count
POST /api/sdm/user/notifications/{id}/read - Mark notification as read
User can see notifications with recipient_type='clients'
User can see notifications with recipient_type='all'
End-to-end workflow: create -> view -> read -> delete notification
UI: Notifications tab with New Notification button
UI: Notification form with Recipients, Type, Priority dropdowns
UI: Notification form with Title, Message, Action URL fields
UI: Send Notification button creates and displays notification
UI: Notifications table with Type, Title, Recipients, Priority, Sent, Actions columns
UI: Delete notification via trash icon
UI: Alerts tab with Test Alert button
UI: Alert Configuration section with Webhook URL input
UI: Alert Configuration section with Alert Emails input
UI: Save Alert Settings button
UI: Alert History table with Type, Balance, Threshold, Webhook, Email, Status, Actions
UI: Acknowledge button for pending alerts

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All Notifications and Alerts UI components working)

seed_data_creation: Created test notifications with various types (system, promo, alert, info) and priorities (low, normal, high, urgent). Test float alerts created via test endpoint.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notification system fully tested. Admin can create notifications targeting all users, clients only, or merchants only. Notifications support 4 types (system, promo, alert, info) and 4 priority levels (low, normal, high, urgent). Users can view their notifications and mark them as read. Float alert system sends webhook POST and email when balance drops below threshold. Alert history shows webhook/email success status and allows acknowledgment.

mocked_integrations.Resend Email API: MOCKED - May fail without valid domain verification. Email alerts show as 'sent' but may not actually deliver.
mocked_integrations.Webhook URL: Test webhook (httpbin.org/post) used for testing. Production webhook URL should be configured.

features_verified.admin_create_notification: ✅ Working - Create notifications with type, priority, recipient type
features_verified.admin_list_notifications: ✅ Working - List and filter by notification_type
features_verified.user_view_notifications: ✅ Working - Users see notifications for 'all' or 'clients' recipient types
features_verified.user_mark_read: ✅ Working - Mark individual notifications as read
features_verified.user_unread_count: ✅ Working - Get count of unread notifications
features_verified.float_alerts_history: ✅ Working - View alert history with webhook/email status
features_verified.float_alerts_acknowledge: ✅ Working - Acknowledge alerts with username and timestamp
features_verified.float_alerts_test: ✅ Working - Test alert endpoint sends to configured webhook/email
features_verified.alert_configuration: ✅ Working - Configure webhook URL and alert emails via admin config
features_verified.notifications_ui_form: ✅ Working - New Notification form with all fields
features_verified.notifications_ui_table: ✅ Working - Table displays notifications with delete action
features_verified.alerts_ui_config: ✅ Working - Webhook URL and Email inputs with save button
features_verified.alerts_ui_history: ✅ Working - Alert History table with acknowledge buttons
